customer_anxiety_profile: Carl is a returning contact who has talked himself into second thoughts since the prior conversation. His anxiety is specific and pre-formed: roof damage from installation, warranty conflict with his new lifetime-warranty roof, and limited sun exposure on the left side of his roof (fall/winter/spring). He is not hostile — he re-engaged and agreed to the appointment — but his default posture is skeptical and he is actively managing expectations downward ('wild goose chase').
unresolved_concerns: Roof damage from panel installation — Carter gave a verbal reassurance but no documentation or specialist confirmation

Warranty conflict: Carl has a lifetime roof warranty and is concerned solar installation could void or complicate it — Carter gave a 25-year panel warranty figure but did not address the interaction with Carl's existing roof warranty
Sun exposure: Carl believes the left side of his roof gets limited sun in fall, winter, and spring — the design report is the promised answer, but Carl has not seen it yet

Utility bill not yet received — appointment is booked contingent on Carl sending the bill; if this is a paid lead, the bill is required before the appointment can be set per schema, but lead type is not confirmed for this call
sensitive_topics_raised: New roof installed last year — Carl is protective of it; any discussion of installation should lead with the warranty and installation process
Carl was driving during the close — he may not have fully registered the Saturday 12PM commitment
exact_promises_rep_made: Text confirmation of Saturday 12PM appointment sent after the call
A call or text beforehand to confirm the appointment still works
The design report will show exactly how much sunlight Carl's home receives and whether solar is worth it for his specific situation
closer_should_know: Carl's second thoughts are roof-specific, not solar-skeptic — he has a new lifetime-warranty roof and is worried installation will damage or void it. Lead with the installation process and warranty protection before touching savings or design. The design report was the promise that kept him on the line; open with it.
